title: Know an Eva like character in your everyday life
display_title: Know an Eva like character in your everyday life
wikitext:
[]: Know an Eva-like character in your everyday life?             Quote Post by Jedi_Master » Fri Apr 10, 2009 11:10 pm Work for a boss that's a babe like Misato? Have a cold or distant father like Gendo? Work with a hot yet arrogant colleague like Asuka? Work for a corporation with an evil board of directors like Seele?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Apr 11, 2009 12:53 am My dad is just Geno. He can be a pain in the ass to live with and he never cares about anything then himself.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Apr 11, 2009 1:09 pm I dated a girl like an Asuka. The relationship was not worth the effort. ....I'd love to find a straight Maya.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsachoul » Sun Apr 12, 2009 4:27 am One of my dogs is like Shinji. He is a rather large animal, perhaps waist high, but he is the most frightened, whining, cringing creature I have ever known, ever since he was a puppy. The other is probably closest to Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Apr 12, 2009 11:04 am at times, my own mom acts kind of like Misato no, she doesn't drink much, dress skimpy or run around hitting on "some younger guy", but she often seems to fret and be super self-conscience like Misato does (I may have just described most everyone's mother, but hey...)

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Sun Apr 12, 2009 7:51 pm sometimes it feels like everyone i know is a variation on Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by nozunam » Sun Apr 12, 2009 9:00 pm our cat, benjie is just like pen^2. all he ever does is sleep and eat and shit =/

[]:             Quote Post by jenova7 » Tue Apr 14, 2009 3:06 am i know a girl who mirrors Asuka's bad attitude on a daily basis

[]:             Quote Post by Pyrite » Mon Apr 27, 2009 8:55 am My little sister is Asuka incarnate. Fiery, violent redhead. Probably why I never understood the Asuka fandom.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Mon Apr 27, 2009 9:58 am I know an Asuka. Cute when she wants to be, but when she doesn't? Yikes. Also, she's smart, talented, reasonably attractive, and outwardly arrogant but inwardly insecure. Oh, and she's about the height of a 14 year old. =P

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 27, 2009 10:20 am Pyrite wrote: Fiery, violent redhead.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Mon Apr 27, 2009 10:50 am My Father=Gendo, except he didn't send me away and isn't a bastard with me(well not most of the time), and isn't trying to reunite with my not dead mother, but all the rest even the pose he have it, except for the beard cause a month ago he shaved off.

[]:             Quote Post by tommh » Fri May 01, 2009 11:41 am We call my ex-best friend Mark Shinji. He's limp, weak, cowardly, and selfish. And although I do pity him, he's annoying as hell to deal with. Hence "ex" best friend.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Apr 11, 200
